strands.label: Historical Thinking And Inquiry
strands.values_basis: Cross-cutting inquiry framework that applies to all historical content through formulating questions, gathering evidence, analysis, and communication.

strands.label: Source Analysis And Evaluation
strands.values_basis: Subject-wide skill for critically examining primary and secondary sources, assessing credibility and limitations across all historical topics.

strands.label: Historical Concepts Thinking
strands.values_basis: Analytical frameworks including Historical Significance, Cause and Consequence, and Continuity and Change that operate as interpretive lenses across content.

strands.label: Chronological Knowledge Progression
strands.values_basis: Sequential understanding of historical periods where knowledge of 1713-1800 events provides necessary context for comprehending 1800-1850 developments.

strands.label: Cause Consequence Analysis
strands.values_basis: Building understanding of how earlier events create conditions for later developments, requiring mastery of prior causal relationships.

strands.label: New France Era Content
strands.values_basis: Specific historical period content (1713-1800) that serves as curriculum coverage but does not define learning target types.

strands.label: Early Canada Era Content
strands.values_basis: Specific historical period content (1800-1850) covering distinct themes and events for curriculum completeness.

strands.label: Indigenous Perspectives Integration
strands.values_basis: Thematic focus on First Nations, Métis, and Inuit experiences across both time periods rather than a skill framework.

strands.label: Historical Empathy Development
strands.values_basis: Growing capacity to understand multiple perspectives and experiences of different groups in historical contexts, developed through sustained practice.

structural_flaw: Period-based organization creates artificial separation between interconnected historical processes and may fragment development of analytical thinking skills across content boundaries.
